sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9383" key="a)ntadikhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντᾰδῐκ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n9383.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must retaliate,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
